title: FoodSearchCriteria
description: Request body schema for the POST /v1/foods/search endpoint to search for foods by keyword.

query.description: Search terms to use in the search. The string may also include standard search operators.

dataType.description: Optional. Filter on a specific data type; specify one or more values in an array.

pageSize.description: Optional. Maximum number of results to return for the current page. Default is 50.

sortBy.description: Optional. Specify one of the possible values to sort by that field.

sortOrder.description: Optional. The sort direction for the results.

brandOwner.description: Optional. Filter results based on the brand owner of the food. Only applies to Branded Foods.
